title: Coming Soon
content:
“Sorry for the dust! We know it’s taking a while but sit tight and we’ll be with you soon.

You’ll be able to order on our website again from the 13th of January. The first 20 visitors to contact us will get a reasonable discount from our brand new High-end systems!

In the meantime, check out our products on our social media platforms.”

title: Contact Us
content:
We will answer any questions you may have about our online sales, rights or partnership service right here.

Do you find yourself wondering how our team's expertise can significantly boost your company's growth trajectory?

Simply shoot us an email, and we'll eagerly engage with you to delve into tailored solutions crafted specifically to address the distinct needs of your business.

Rest assured, your success is paramount to us, and we stand ready to offer unwavering support and guidance at every stage of your journey toward achieving your goals.

title: Privacy Policy
content:
Our website address is: https://woodmart.xtemos.com.

Thank you for visiting XTemos Studio. We are a company, creating products to enhance your website building experience. Please read this Privacy Policy, providing consent to document in order to have permission to use our services.

1. COMMENTSWhen visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection. An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.2. MEDIAIf you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.3. CONTACT FORMSIf you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year. If you have an account and you log in to this site, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser. When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select “Remember Me”, your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed. If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.4. EMBEDDED CONTENT FROM OTHER WEBSITESArticles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website. These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracing your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.5. HOW LONG WE RETAIN YOUR DATAIf you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue. For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.6. WHAT RIGHTS YOU HAVE OVER YOUR DATAIf you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.7. WHERE WE SEND YOUR DATAVisitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

title: Privacy Policy
content:
Last Updated: 23/10/2025

This Privacy Policy explains how Technocrat Online Stores Ltd. (“we,” “our,” or “us”) collects, uses, discloses, and protects your personal information when you use our Lease Management System (“the Platform”).

1. Information We Collect

We collect personal information (name, phone number, email,NIN), verification data (OTPs), financial data (wallet and transaction history), and device/usage data (device type, IP address, usage analytics).

2. How We Use Your Information

We use collected data to verify your identity, process OTP confirmations, facilitate wallet funding and lease transactions, manage applications, communicate updates, and improve services.

3. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We may share information with financial institutions, service providers, and regulatory authorities as required by law. We do not sell or rent your information.

4. Data Security

We implement encryption and secure servers to protect your data from unauthorized access, disclosure, or alteration.

5. Data Retention

We retain data only as long as necessary for operational or legal purposes and delete or anonymize it thereafter.

6. Your Rights

You can access, correct, or delete your data, withdraw consent, and opt out of marketing communications by contacting our support team at support@technocratng.com

7. Cookies and Tracking

We may use cookies or analytics tools to enhance functionality and analyze usage trends. You can disable cookies in your device settings.

8. Third-Party Links

Our Platform may contain external links. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Updates will be posted with a revised “Last Updated” date.

10. Contact Us

Technocrat Online Stores Ltd.
Email: info@technocratng.com
Address: 15/17 kodesho ikeja

title: TERMS OF USE
content:
Last Updated: 23/10/2025

Welcome to the Lease Management System (“the Platform”) operated by Technocrat Online Stores Ltd. (“we,” “our,” or “us”). These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of our mobile application and related services. By using this Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.

1. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements to use the Platform. By registering, you represent and warrant that the information you provide is true, accurate, and complete.

2. Account Registration and Verification

Customers are onboarded using their mobile phone number. A One-Time Password (OTP) will be sent to your registered number to verify your identity during registration and for sensitive account-related changes. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities under your account.

3. Wallet and Payment Services

The Platform provides a wallet feature integrated with a partner bank via a one-time virtual account number to facilitate wallet funding and payments. All wallet credits are processed through secure banking integrations. You agree to comply with any banking regulations and terms of our partner financial institutions. We are not responsible for delays or failures caused by third-party payment processors or banks.

4. Lease Services

The Platform allows users to submit lease applications for available products or services, and track the approval, rejection, or cancellation status of their applications. Approval decisions are based on our internal evaluation criteria, and we reserve the right to accept or reject any application at our sole discretion.

5. User Responsibilities

You agree to provide accurate and updated personal and financial information, use the Platform only for lawful purposes, and not misuse, reverse-engineer, or disrupt the functionality of the Platform. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms or engage in fraudulent or abusive activities.

6. Data Accuracy and Availability

We strive to keep the Platform accurate and available at all times, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted access or error-free operation. Maintenance, upgrades, or unforeseen circumstances may cause temporary downtime.

7. Intellectual Property

All content, designs, and software on this Platform are the property of Technocrat Online Stores Ltd. and protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, modify, or distribute any part of the Platform without prior written consent.

8. Limitation of Liability

Technocrat Online Stores Ltd. is not liable for losses due to unauthorized access to your account caused by your negligence, service interruptions, transaction failures, or delays caused by third parties, or indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform.

9. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Platform without notice if you violate these Terms or applicable laws.

10. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms periodically. Updated versions will be posted on the Platform, and continued use after changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria, and disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Lagos State.
